model_compare.verification_rule: Recheck official OpenAI docs before claims that depend on current model limits.

codex_plan_limits.verification_rule: Plan and usage limits are dynamic and depend on task complexity, surface, and context held.

codex_cli.verification_rule: CLI capabilities and configuration options can change with Codex CLI version.

known_unknowns.risk: The CLI may summarize, prioritize, or omit local context before model submission.
known_unknowns.handling: Use route packages and durable artifacts instead of assuming raw repository or transcript inclusion.

known_unknowns.risk: Command output displayed to the agent may be capped or truncated independently of model context.
known_unknowns.handling: Write durable evidence files for important outputs and summarize into receipts.

known_unknowns.risk: Limits vary by subscription, workspace controls, task complexity, and active OpenAI policy.
known_unknowns.handling: Verify from account/runtime state before planning high-volume or long-running work.

known_unknowns.risk: Hook payloads may be capped, timed out, or ignored depending on launch root and CLI behavior.
known_unknowns.handling: Keep parent and active-root hooks tested and ensure recency snapshot survives default truncation.

audit_requirements: PYTHONPATH=ION/04_packages python3 -m kernel.ion_codex_solo_context --ion-root '/home/sev/ION - Production/ION_CODEX FULL' boot-context
